Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hey, hold on a sec. You're the captain, aren't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hey, quit pushing! Practice is over![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}You there! Sanada-kun, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}That was an incredible bout! I've never seen a middle schooler deliver a KO like that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}I'm with the school you were up against in the finals. What do you say to enrolling with us?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}We'll give you a real generous scholarship—[cr][n]you'd only have to pay half your tuition![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Wait, you're from another school!? Poaching's against the rules and you know it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 252 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Sorry, but I don't see any reason to attend a school that places second.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 252 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}...Good luck finding someone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Sanada-kun, you're so cool![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You hear that? He'd never go to your loser school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Seriously, will you all just go home already!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We can't leave until you guys do, dammit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Couldn't you have handled that with a little more tact?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I heard it gets crowded after practice, so I decided to wait here instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Third-year, Class C... Akihiko Sanada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hm...? You're not going to ask who I am?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 252 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Whatever it is you're here for, I'm not interested. All I want is to train and become stronger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Oh, it's nothing troublesome. In fact, I have a rather simple request.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I have enemies that need defeating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Only thing is, they're not people—meaning, there's no need to play by the rules, not like in the ring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}No, these enemies... They're related to what you go through every midnight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}You see, I'm in the same situation. I experience the same thing you do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}The difference is, I know what it means, so if you'll join me... I'll share what I know with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Mitsuru Kirijo. I'm a third-year, like yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Earlier, you said you wanted to train and become stronger, but what you really need is a challenge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 253 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}And with this... you'll be able to defeat them.[n]{f 1 1}
